provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture, visible brushstrokes, architectural interior or exterior, floor-to-ceiling holographic commodity display inside an alien trading station — shifting teal and gold data streams, real-time price feeds and trade volume indicators projected on translucent membrane walls, chrome structural elements reflecting the glow, micro-dimple flooring for tentacle grip, condensation on every metal surface, the living heartbeat of an interstellar market
